mapper.select: SELECT ls.id, ls.presalesCode, ls.lendCode, ls.saleCode, ls.lendAmount, ls.saleAmount, ls.status, ls.createTime FROM pm_presales_lend2sale ls WHERE ls.presalesCode = #{presalesCode} ORDER BY ls.createTime DESC

SELECT lr.id, lr.presalesCode, lr.lendCode, lr.rmaCode, lr.lendAmount, lr.rmaAmount, lr.status, lr.createTime FROM pm_presales_lend2rma lr WHERE lr.presalesCode = #{presalesCode} ORDER BY lr.createTime DESC
